messages.message: Fantasy Team created successfully. Please review the Playing XI on the right. The team has been generated after analysing player form, venue history, weather conditions and pitch behaviour.
Replace KL Rahul with Ishan Kishan
KL Rahul has been retained because his predicted fantasy score is higher than Ishan Kishan for this match based on venue history, current form and weather conditions.
Why did you choose Yashasvi Jaiswal as Captain?
Yashasvi Jaiswal was selected as Captain because of his excellent recent batting form, strong record against England, and high projected fantasy points on a batting-friendly pitch.
